values.value: Flags newly registered connected apps that have been authorized by more than five distinct users within the last 24 hours. A sudden surge of consent grants on a brand-new app is a classic indicator of an OAuth phishing campaign or a viral integration spreading faster than security review can keep up with.

Pull the list of users who authorized the app and confirm with a sample whether the consent was intentional. If the app is unrecognized or unapproved, block it, revoke its active tokens, and notify the affected users. If legitimate, document the approval and adjust scope policy if needed.
